texto: You can have anything you want if you want it desperately enough. You must want it with an inner exuberance that erupts through the skin and joins the energy that created the world.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sheila Graham sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “You can have anything you want if you want it desperately enough. You must want it with an inner …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, enthusiasm, anything, útil em momentos de reflexao.
